arts.ttl: Papers: Bayern set to battle Man City for Leverkusen star Wirtz
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Saturday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: McAtee shows commitment in celebrations, says Guardiola
arts.sum: Guardiola says the way John Stones celebrated Kevin De Bruyne’s winner in the fourth round win showed how much it meant to the Blues. Pep Guardiola says he knows his players still have the will to win by the way they celebrate goals.

arts.ttl: Rodri returns to Man City training after ACL injury
arts.sum: Ballon d' Or winner Rodri has returned to individual training with Manchester City, boosting his prospects of returning to action this season after suffering an ACL injury in September.

arts.ttl: Injuries the only question mark over Jack Grealish – Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: The £100million Manchester City winger has made just 13 starts and 25 appearances overall this term.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola drops Ilkay Gundogan contract bombshell to complicate Man City succession plan
arts.sum: Manchester City fans have made their feelings clear on the futures of Ilkay Gundogan and Kevin De Bruyne with both contracts up at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: A rare slip by genius Guardiola is the cause of Manchester City’s slump
arts.sum: After head coach’s failure to recognise the need to upgrade an ageing squad last summer, the FA Cup is their last hope In Manchester City having only the FA Cup to chase we see the product of the club’s failed summer recruitment, ill fortune with injury and the ravage of time to a core of Pep Guardiola’s all-conquering squad. While Julián Álvarez’s club-record £81.5m sale to Atlético Madrid in the close season bulged transfer coffers, only Savinho was recruited for £30m, alongside the return of the now 34-year-old Ilkay Gündogan for free, as Guardiola decided no major replenishment was needed. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Video: Rodri "on the road to recovery" as Man City release training video of Ballon d'Or winner
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder and Ballon d'Or winner Rodri returns to training five months after rupturing the anterior cruciate ligament in his right knee.

arts.ttl: Man City star Rodri returns to individual training after serious knee injury
arts.sum: It was expected Rodri would miss the rest of the season, but the Spain international has set his sights on returning in time for the Club World Cup.

arts.ttl: Man City provide huge Rodri injury update as footage emerges
arts.sum: The latest Manchester City news as the midfielder is expected to miss the rest of the season after suffering an ACL injury back in September.

arts.ttl: Inside the magic of Plymouth’s FA Cup run - and its deeper meaning
arts.sum: As the Championship side travel to Manchester City in the fifth round, captain Joe Edwards tells Miguel Delaney about the club’s wider role and commitment to environmentally conscious choices
